pr294_post_evals_numeric_id_fix.description: Close a fail-open in scripts/post_evals.sh::smoke_run: jq's `--arg id "$id"` always binds a shell string, so `select(.id == $id)` never matches a JSON-number eval id. cmd/negative_control lookups went silently empty, nothing executed, smoke was written as null, and the function still returned exit 0 (freeze-time smoke evidence recorded for commands never run).
pr294_post_evals_numeric_id_fix.fix: Type guard added at the top of smoke_run (scripts/post_evals.sh) refusing any scripted eval with a non-string id, per the schema's existing string-id definition. +13 lines scripts/post_evals.sh, +20 lines hooks/scripts/tests/post_evals.test.sh.
pr294_post_evals_numeric_id_fix.self_mergeable: yes — neither scripts/post_evals.sh nor hooks/scripts/tests/post_evals.test.sh matches TIER_GATE_PATH_DENYLIST, unlike PRs #288 and #292 in this same session
pr294_post_evals_numeric_id_fix.provenance: Discovered incidentally while building eval artifacts for a different PR in this session — an eval worker hit the null-smoke symptom live, and the mechanism was then verified from source (jq --arg type binding), not found by a dedicated audit.
